text: Large pothole on the main road near Jubilee Hills circle causing accidents daily.
Water pipe burst near Banjara Hills road no 12, water flowing on street for 2 days.
Street lights are not working on SR Nagar main road for past 3 weeks.
Garbage not collected from Ameerpet locality for a week, very foul smell.
Drainage overflow in Kukatpally during rains causing waterlogging on roads.
New park in Madhapur is well maintained, residents are very happy with it.
Illegal construction blocking footpath in Begumpet, pedestrians are in danger.
Loud music from event hall at Himayatnagar is disturbing residents every night.
Road widening in Gachibowli completed nicely, traffic has improved significantly.
Overhead water tank in Kondapur is leaking, wasting thousands of liters daily.
Streetlight near Secunderabad railway station is damaged and posing risk.
Garbage dumping near Dilsukhnagar bus stop is a public health hazard.
Multiple potholes on Tarnaka road making commute very difficult and dangerous.
Water supply in LB Nagar is very irregular, only 1 hour per day.
Jeedimetla industrial area has excellent road infrastructure now.
Transformer burnt in Malakpet, entire area without power for 2 days.
Plastic waste piling up near Uppal junction, needs immediate attention.
Illegal structure blocking drainage in Tolichowki causing frequent flooding.
Noise from construction site at midnight in Somajiguda is unbearable.
Park in Nizampet has new benches and children's play area, excellent work!
Sewage water mixing with drinking water supply in Santoshnagar is dangerous.
Road near Mehdipatnam flyover has deep cracks and needs urgent repair.
Power cuts in Saidabad are frequent, lasting 6-8 hours daily.
Garbage collection in Kothapet has improved this month, team is punctual.
Footpath encroached by vendors in Abids makes walking very difficult.
Water meter billing error in Vanasthalipuram, charged triple the usual amount.
Road near Chandrayangutta is very narrow and prone to accidents.
Electric pole leaning dangerously in Falaknuma, risk of falling.
Open drain near Amberpet school is a health hazard for children.
Park beautification in Nacharam was done very well, residents are grateful.
Road divider broken near Malkajgiri bus stop since 3 months.
Illegal dumping of construction waste in Yapral open ground.
Water tankers not coming to Hafizpet for 5 days now, severe shortage.
Street light installation in Nagole was completed ahead of schedule, great work.
Pothole filled water near Saroornagar bus stand causing dengue risk.
Loud firecrackers in Musheerabad late at night disturbing everyone.
Borewell not functioning in Boduppal colony, 500 families affected.
Road in Kompally has been freshly laid, smooth commute now.
Uncleared garbage at Patancheru market has become a huge pile.
High tension wire hanging low over road in Alwal, very dangerous.
Sewage pipe blocked in Miyapur, raw sewage flowing on road.
Trees planted in Bahadurpally under green drive are growing well.
Power supply irregular in Dundigal, disrupting business and household work.
Massive garbage pile near Quthbullapur bus stop needs immediate clearance.
Road near Ghatkesar is waterlogged every time it rains.
Old dilapidated building in Musheerabad is at risk of collapse.
Lack of dustbins in Shamshabad market area leads to open littering.
Street lights repaired in Keesara, residents feel much safer now.
Water quality in Bhongir seems contaminated, yellowish tint in water.
Multiple potholes near Jubilee Hills check post need urgent repair.
Garbage truck not visiting Banjara Hills sector 2 for past 10 days.
Power pole damaged in Ameerpet after storm, not repaired for 4 days.
Noise pollution from bar and restaurant in Madhapur is excessive.
Footpath broken and uneven in Begumpet near consulate road.
Gachibowli tech corridor roads are among the best in Hyderabad.
Dilsukhnagar has open manholes on main road that are dangerous at night.
New road built in Tarnaka connecting IT hub is very useful.
LB Nagar main road has been resurfaced, no more potholes now.
Electricity meter tampered in Malakpet, suspecting theft.
Uppal ward office staff is very helpful and responsive to complaints.
Solar street lights installed in Saidabad main road are very effective.
Kothapet vegetable market area is extremely dirty and unhygienic.
ECIL main road pothole repair done very quickly after complaint.
Hafizpet water supply schedule improved after residents petition.
New water purification plant in Boduppal improved water quality.
Miyapur subway area street lighting inadequate, safety concern for women.
